aspects.name: battery
aspects.summary: Users report that the battery easily lasts up to two days even under heavy usage.

aspects.name: camera
aspects.summary: Camera performance is considered average: acceptable in daylight but weak in low light conditions.

aspects.name: display
aspects.summary: The display quality is highly praised with vibrant colors and excellent brightness levels, perfect for outdoor use.

aspects.name: performance
aspects.summary: Overall performance is smooth for daily tasks and gaming, though some users experience occasional lag during multitasking.

aspects.name: build_quality
aspects.summary: Build quality feels premium with a solid construction, but the device is slightly heavier than competitors.

aspects.name: price
aspects.summary: Many users feel the product is overpriced compared to similar offerings in the market.

aspects.name: software
aspects.summary: The software experience is generally smooth with regular updates, though some bloatware is present.

aspects.name: charging
aspects.summary: Fast charging capability is impressive, fully charging the device in under an hour.
